definition: A pipeline step or executor agent dispatches B (a session-agent or sub-pipeline) for specialized verified work; A continues after B returns verified output. The dispatch is the substrate primitive for 'pipeline-step-with-sa.* verifier' pattern (v1.7 instance: sa.hub-groomer; formalized at v1.10).
source: v1.7 brief 6b5f7886 Decision 6 (capsule v2.5 narrowed: relationships kind:dispatches codification only); supports sa.hub-groomer relationship semantics in v1.7 Stream A6
